meta.title: The fashion industry
meta.sourceDoc: 53. P2 - The fashion industry 时尚产业.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The fashion industry 时尚产业

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：v
PDF 定位："the industry accounts for a significant share of world economic output."（第A段）
PDF 解析：第A段整段强调服装业对全球经济的巨大贡献，因此选vTheimportanceof the fashion industry

题目 15
答案：ii
PDF 定位："By the beginning of the 2oth century...clothing had increasingly come to bemass-produced ..."（第B段)
PDF 解析：第B段回顾从19世纪中期到20世纪服装业如何兴起并走向大规模生产，对 应 ii The rise of the fashion industry。

题目 16
答案：iv
PDF 定位："fabrics are produced with a wide range of visual effects... Together with fashion forecasters, fabric manufacturers work well in advance... (第C段)
PDF 解析：第C段重点描述各种功能与视觉效果的面料生产，符合ivProducing materials with a range of features.

题目 17
答案：i
PDF 定位："designers draw inspiration from..street clothing and active
PDF 解析：第D段聚焦于设计师如何创作新款式，选iHownewclothingstyles are created.

题目 18
答案：viii
PDF 定位："templates, in a range of sizes, for cutting the cloth...difficult to adjust for every body shape."(第E段)
PDF 解析：第E段讲模板（纸样）制作并解决不同体型的问题，故选viliMaking patterns for people with different figures。

题目 19
答案：iii
PDF 定位："The next stage of production is the assembly proces.. sewing remains labour-intensive."（第F段）
PDF 解析：第F段描述把布片缝合组装成衣服的全过程，选iiJoiningthegarment pieces together

题目 20
答案：vi
PDF 定位："quotas and tariffs... free-trade approach... inexpensive air freight has made it possible for production to be closely tied to market conditions." (第G段）
PDF 解析：第G段讨论贸易管制、关税与全球运输对行业的影响，对应viFactors affecting international commerce.

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：sewing machine
PDF 定位："..partly due to inventions like the sewing machine." (第 B段)
PDF 解析：直接填入发明名称；两词以内符合要求。

题目 22
答案：department stores
PDF 定位："..and the growth of department stores and other retail outlets... （第B段）
PDF 解析：概述推动时尚行业扩张的零售形式。

题目 23
答案：fixed prices
PDF 定位："..mass-produced in standard sizes and sold at fixed prices." (第 B段)
PDF 解析：说明标准化尺码后还出现了"固定价格"。

题目 24
答案：Europe
PDF 定位："Although the fashion industry developed first in Europe, today it is highly globalised.. (第B段)
PDF 解析：填原点地区；单词数量符合要求。

questionSections.text:
题目 25
答案：C
PDF 定位：..the majority rely on separately owned manufacturing firms or contractors toproducegarment.."(第F段)
PDF 解析：说明大多数企业把生产外包给其他公司，验证选项C。

题目 26
答案：D
PDF 定位："Assembled items then go through various processes collectively known as 'finishing' These include the addition of decorative elements, fasteners,brand-name labels... (第F段)
PDF 解析：先组装后再加扣件和标签，与选项D对应。
